mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, quiz_idx, quiz_req_idx, quiz_answer, name, school, hak, ban, phone, zip_code, address, winner_yn, add_ip, add_id, to_char(add_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as add_date, chosen_yn, num FROM QUIZ_REQ WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND quiz_idx = #{quiz_idx} ORDER BY quiz_req_idx DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT homepage_id, quiz_idx, quiz_req_idx, quiz_answer, name, school, hak, ban, phone, zip_code, address, winner_yn, add_ip, add_id, to_char(add_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as add_date, chosen_yn, DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE AS rand, num FROM QUIZ_REQ WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND quiz_idx = #{quiz_idx} ORDER BY quiz_req_idx DESC ) ORDER BY rand

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, QUIZ_IDX, QUIZ_REQ_IDX, QUIZ_ANSWER, NAME, SCHOOL, HAK, BAN, PHONE, ZIP_CODE, ADDRESS, WINNER_YN, ADD_IP, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, CHOSEN_YN, NUM FROM QUIZ_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} AND QUIZ_REQ_IDX = #{quiz_req_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} AND ADD_ID = #{add_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE QUIZ_REQ SET add_id = NULL, name = NULL, ban = 0, phone = NULL WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx}
